title: Photorealistic Ghibli Movie Poster
sourceTitle: Photorealistic Studio Ghibli Style Poster Totoro Catbus

imagePrompts.prompt: * "Photorealistic Studio Ghibli-style poster of Totoro and the Catbus at a countryside bus stop during golden hour. Two young sisters hold hands in the foreground: the younger girl in a pink pinafore dress holds corn, the older girl wears a beige shirt with orange suspenders and skirt. Behind them, a large smiling Totoro stands next to a moss-covered Catbus with Japanese kanji  on the signboard, with two small soot sprites on top. Include a vintage Japanese bus stop sign with kanji  on the left. Add text on the left side: large serif text 'Totoro', small Totoro icon, and the quote 'SOME JOURNEYS STAY WITH US FOREVER.' Warm soft lighting, nostalgic atmosphere, detailed fur texture, grassy dirt path, shallow depth of field, vertical 2:3 aspect ratio."
imagePrompts.title: Photorealistic Studio Ghibli Style Poster Totoro Catbus
